summary: Iteration 206: Inside Sales Pilot Refactor Backend Verification Complete. All 22 backend tests passed. Verified: (1) Unified validation service facade imports work (validate_document, run_bc_prod_validation, run_readiness, run_pilot_readiness, POLICY_STAGES), (2) Policies registry returns 4 policies (archive, warehouse, ap_invoice, sales_order) with correct fallback behavior, (3) All pilot endpoints respond correctly (status, validate/{doc_id}, diagnose-order-match, validate-all), (4) Readiness evaluate returns 404 for non-existent docs, (5) Low-volume vendor gate code exists with threshold=5, (6) BOL/tracking field extraction code exists, (7) Fuzzy normalized search tier exists in _check_order with 6-char minimum.
critical_code_review_comments: unified_validation_service.py: Clean facade pattern with POLICY_STAGES dict mapping doc types to validation stages
policies/registry.py: Correctly auto-registers 4 policies on import with archive as fallback
bc_prod_validator.py: _check_order has proper search tier priority (cache_multi → direct_cache → live_bc → customer_scoped → fuzzy_normalized)
document_readiness_service.py: LOW_VOLUME_THRESHOLD=5 gate correctly downgrades ready_auto_* to needs_review for new vendors
inside_sales_pilot_service.py: _extract_sales_fields correctly extracts bol_number, tracking_number, carrier from extracted_fields/normalized_fields
routers/inside_sales_pilot.py: validate/{doc_id} correctly uses unified facade run_bc_prod_validation
routers/readiness.py: evaluate/{doc_id} correctly uses unified facade run_readiness and returns 404 for missing docs
test_credentials: N/A - backend-only testing, no auth required for tested endpoints
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - preview environment has existing bc_reference_cache with 1365 sales_order records
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 206 verified Inside Sales Pilot refactor. Preview env has 0 pilot documents but 1365 sales_order records in bc_reference_cache. All unified validation service facade imports work. Policies registry has 4 policies with archive fallback. Endpoints tested: GET /api/inside-sales-pilot/status (enabled=false, 7 mailboxes), POST /api/inside-sales-pilot/validate/{doc_id} (returns error dict for non-existent), GET /api/inside-sales-pilot/diagnose-order-match (has hit_via_fuzzy_normalized in summary), POST /api/inside-sales-pilot/validate-all (returns scores array), POST /api/readiness/evaluate/{doc_id} (returns 404 for non-existent). Code introspection verified: low-volume vendor gate (threshold=5), BOL/tracking extraction, fuzzy_normalized search tier (6-char min).
